Note: This is a characterization test that passed without requiring any new implementation. The behavior was already correctly implemented in `claim()` because `INSURANCE_VALUE_BY_ITEM_TYPE` lookup applies a flat per-item insurance value (sword=1000, rune=250) and is summed directly without invoking the block-pricing logic that only affects `quote()` premiums.
